mentions.note: LTL spin-off began trading today; unlocks independent unit from $90B parent's competing priorities. CEO Smith targets 15% operating ratio by 2029; largest, fastest, most reliable network. Cramer keeping in charitable trust.
LTL division spinning off Monday under symbol FDXF; Cramer sees potential 'true winner' due to benign neglect under parent, but prefers parent FDX.
